title: Eminia antennulifera
taxonomy: Eminia antennulifera is a species of flowering plant in the family Leguminosae. It belongs to the genus Eminia, which is a part of the subfamily Caesalpinioideae. The Leguminosae family is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as legumes, which includes a wide range of plants such as beans, peas, and peanuts. The Caesalpinioideae subfamily includes various trees and shrubs, many of which are native to Africa and Asia. Eminia antennulifera is native to tropical regions of Africa.
